title: README.md: Point to Podman's channels
body:
There's a significant number of non-IRC users in the bridged rooms,
both Matrix and Discord. So, we should mention those options too.

[NO TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>


#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Update README.md to point to podman.io's community page instead of only mentioning the IRC channel

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None


@vrothberg @mheon @baude @rhatdan @TomSweeneyRedHat @Luap99 PTAL

Related: https://github.com/containers/netavark/pull/8

comments.body:
LGTM
FYI @lsm5 , the next time you have a document only PR like this, please use the `[CI:DOCS]` label and you'll avoid a lot of the testing.

> LGTM FYI @lsm5 , the next time you have a document only PR like this, please use the `[CI:DOCS]` label and you'll avoid a lot of the testing.

ack, i mixed that up with [NO TESTS NEEDED], my bad.
